title: Superconducting qubit memory of quantum computer
abstract: A qubit memory of a quantum computer is provided. The qubit memory according to an embodiment includes a first readout unit, a first transmon, and a first data storage unit storing quantum information, and the first data storage unit includes a first superconducting waveguide layer, an insulating layer, and a superconductor layer sequentially stacked on a substrate. In one example, the first superconducting waveguide layer may include a superconducting resonator.
claims: 1. A qubit memory of a quantum computer, the qubit memory comprising: a first qubit memory, wherein the first qubit memory comprises a first data storage unit configured to store quantum information, wherein the first data storage unit comprises: a substrate; and a plurality of superconducting waveguide layers which are separated from each other and vertically stacked on the substrate, and wherein the first data storage unit further comprises an insulating layer and a superconductor layer that are between the plurality of superconducting waveguide layers.
